Title: TeamPCP Malicious entrypoint.sh - Trivy Stealer
Description: Trivy-action credential stealer. Dumps Runner.Worker process memory and exfiltrates encrypted secrets. Source: Phoenix Security.
RecommendedActions: Quarantine and rotate all CI/CD secrets and cloud credentials.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 4 Final Form
Description: Self-propagating npm worm with armed ICP blockchain C2 backdoor. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Rotate npm tokens. Remove systemd pgmon service. Delete /tmp/pglog.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 3 Self-Propagating Test
Description: Self-propagating worm variant with test payload. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Rotate npm tokens. Audit npm packages for unauthorized version bumps.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 2 Armed ICP Backdoor
Description: Armed ICP blockchain backdoor with manual deployment. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Remove systemd pgmon service. Block ICP canister domain.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 1 deploy.js
Description: Initial deploy script spreading malicious payload to npm packages via stolen tokens. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Rotate npm publishing tokens. Audit all published packages.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 2 deploy.js
Description: Deploy script with --tag latest flag for wider propagation. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Rotate npm publishing tokens. Check npm audit logs.

Title: TeamPCP CanisterWorm Wave 3+ Minified deploy.js
Description: Minified silent deploy script for stealth npm propagation. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Rotate npm tokens. Audit npm packages for patch bumps Mar 20-24.

Title: TeamPCP C2 Server - checkmarx.zone
Description: Primary C2 IP for Checkmarx/KICS supply chain wave. Port 443. Source: Sysdig TRT / Wiz.
RecommendedActions: Block at firewall. Rotate secrets if any connection detected.

Title: TeamPCP C2 Server - scan.aquasecurtiy.org
Description: Primary C2 IP for Trivy supply chain wave. Port 443. Source: Wiz / StepSecurity.
RecommendedActions: Block at firewall. Rotate CI/CD secrets if connection detected.

Title: TeamPCP C2 Domain - Checkmarx Typosquat
Description: Typosquat C2 domain for credential exfiltration and payload delivery. Resolves to 83.142.209.11. Source: Wiz / Sysdig.
RecommendedActions: Block at DNS and proxy. Search logs for historical resolution.

Title: TeamPCP C2 Domain - Aqua Security Typosquat
Description: Typosquat C2 domain - deliberate misspelling aquasecurTIY. Resolves to 45.148.10.212. Source: Wiz / Socket.
RecommendedActions: Block at DNS and proxy. Typosquat designed to evade manual log review.

Title: TeamPCP C2 Domain - LiteLLM PyPI Wave
Description: C2 domain for trojanized LiteLLM PyPI packages v1.82.7 and v1.82.8. Source: Endor Labs / Mend.
RecommendedActions: Block domain. Check pip show litellm for compromised versions.

Title: TeamPCP ICP Canister - CanisterWorm Dead-Drop C2
Description: ICP blockchain canister dead-drop C2. Cannot be taken down conventionally. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Block domain. Check for systemd pgmon service on Linux hosts.

Title: TeamPCP Second-Stage Payload URL
Description: Second-stage credential stealer package triggered by compromised OpenVSX extensions. Source: Wiz.
RecommendedActions: Block URL. Search proxy logs for any GET requests.

Title: TeamPCP Exfiltration Endpoint - VSX
Description: Exfiltration endpoint receiving encrypted tpcp.tar.gz credential archives. Source: Wiz.
RecommendedActions: Block URL. Search proxy logs for POST requests.

Title: TeamPCP Persistence Polling URL
Description: Persistence backdoor polls this URL every 50 minutes. Kill switch: youtube in response. Source: Wiz.
RecommendedActions: Block URL. Check systemd user services for sysmon.service.

Title: TeamPCP ICP Canister C2 Full URL
Description: ICP blockchain canister dead-drop polled every 50 min by Python backdoor. Source: Aikido Security.
RecommendedActions: Block URL. Hunt for /tmp/pglog and /tmp/.pg_state on Linux hosts.
